name: Liz Rivera Consulting
description: Legal nurse consultant with 10 years of ICU nursing experience, specializing in Cardiac Intensive Care.

name: Mila Carlson Nurse Consulting
description: Provides legal nurse consulting services using nursing background for attorneys, healthcare organizations, and legal liability reviews.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Excellent deposition were major factors in arriving at a substantial settlement
Ms. Carlson's calculations of the cost of future medical care...were major factors

sentiment.summary: Attorney praised Ms. Carlson's expert calculations and excellent deposition testimony as major contributors to achieving a substantial client settlement.

name: Simaytis Legal Nurse Consulting, LLC
description: Founded in 2020 by Deborah Simaytis, specializing in analyzing complex medical histories for legal cases.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: skilled in analyzing long term care facility charts and highlighting negligence
wealth of knowledge and expertise to assist in serving as an expert
turnaround time is excellent, their reports are detailed and address deviations to Standard of Care
excellent analysis of facts. Communication in appropriate and understandable fashion

sentiment.summary: Consistently positive reviews across multiple legal clients praising Deborah's expertise, thoroughness, responsiveness, and professionalism in nursing home negligence case analysis and Standard of Care evaluations.
